Wrong Display Name 'Patient Summary' for http://loinc.org#60591-5. Valid display is one of 3 choices: 'Patient summary Document' (en-US), 'Patient summary Document' (en-US) or 'Patient summary Doc' (en-US) (for the language(s) 'en-US')
The concept '333598008' has a status of inactive and its use should be reviewed

UCUM Codes that contain human readable annotations like {INR} can be misleading (e.g. they are ignored when comparing units). Best Practice is not to depend on annotations in the UCUM code, so this usage should be checked
A definition for CodeSystem 'urn:vivodepot:codesystem:v1' could not be found, so the code cannot be validated

None of the codings provided are in the value set 'Provenance activity type' (http://hl7.org/fhir/ValueSet/provenance-activity-type|4.0.1), and a coding should come from this value set unless it has no suitable code (note that the validator cannot judge what is suitable) (codes = urn:vivodepot:codesystem:v1#urn:vivodepot:activity:ips-export)
Validate resource against profile http://hl7.org/fhir/uv/ips/StructureDefinition/Composition-uv-ips - provided as bundle param
